Add task to the scheduler.
addTask(int, Runnable) - Method in class net.pl3x.guithium.api.scheduler.AbstractScheduler
Add non-repeating task to the scheduler with delay.
addTask(Runnable) - Method in class net.pl3x.guithium.api.scheduler.AbstractScheduler
Add non-repeating task to the scheduler to run on the next tick.
addTask(Task) - Method in class net.pl3x.guithium.api.scheduler.AbstractScheduler
Add task to the scheduler.
